description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by lush greenery and mature trees, creating a private and inviting atmosphere. The structure features a flat roof with multiple sections, some of which are slightly elevated, and a mix of light-colored exterior walls with accents of brown and muted red. Large windows and glass doors are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The front of the bungalow is defined by a wide driveway leading to the main entrance, with a manicured lawn and pathways enhancing curb appeal. The rear and sides of the building are bordered by dense foliage, providing seclusion and a natural backdrop. The overall design is modern with clean lines and a functional layout, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and surrounded by dense trees and a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide driveway, manicured lawn, and symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the building's depth, multiple roof sections, and dense tree coverage on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows and doors facing a thick line of trees, providing privacy and natural scenery.
description_view_3: Side view with visible driveway, side entrance, and a mix of window sizes, framed by trees and shrubbery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows on all facades
